requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (BOS / IEC CISPR 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（BOS/IEC CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（BOS/IEC CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Botswana does not operate a stand-alone EU-style EMC Directive. Where electromagnetic compatibility is addressed, the Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) relies on Botswana Standards (BOS) that adopt the international IEC / CISPR base — for household appliances this is the CISPR 14 family: CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) — the same international root as the EU EN 55014 series and China's GB 4343.1. For radio-emitting features (e.g. Wi-Fi/Bluetooth in smart refrigerators), spectrum/type-approval falls to BOCRA (Botswana Communications Regulatory Authority) rather than BOBS. In practice, demonstrating EMC performance to the CISPR 14 basis (ideally via an IEC/CB or accredited-laboratory report) supports BOBS conformity; a refrigerator's EMC behaviour is dominated by its compressor/inverter drive and switching electronics.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳不实施独立的欧盟式电磁兼容指令。在涉及电磁兼容之处，博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）依据采用国际IEC/CISPR基准的博茨瓦纳标准（BOS）——家用器具方面即CISPR 14系列：CISPR 14-1（发射）和CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）——与欧盟EN 55014系列及中国GB 4343.1同源。对于带无线功能的产品（如智能冰箱的Wi-Fi/蓝牙），频谱/型号核准由BOCRA（博茨瓦纳通信监管局）而非BOBS负责。实务上，以CISPR 14基准证明电磁兼容性能（最好经IEC/CB或认可实验室报告）有助于BOBS符合性；电冰箱的电磁兼容特性主要由其压缩机/变频驱动及开关电子设备决定。
summary.zht: 波札那不實施獨立的歐盟式電磁相容指令。在涉及電磁相容之處，波札那標準局（BOBS）依據採用國際IEC/CISPR基準的波札那標準（BOS）——家用器具方面即CISPR 14系列：CISPR 14-1（發射）和CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）——與歐盟EN 55014系列及中國GB 4343.1同源。對於帶無線功能的產品（如智慧冰箱的Wi-Fi/藍牙），頻譜/型號核准由BOCRA（波札那通信監管局）而非BOBS負責。實務上，以CISPR 14基準證明電磁相容性能（最好經IEC/CB或認可實驗室報告）有助於BOBS符合性；電冰箱的電磁相容特性主要由其壓縮機/變頻驅動及開關電子設備決定。

standards_or_laws: BOS / CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (international base adopted by BOBS where applicable)
BOS / CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (international base)
BOCRA (Botswana Communications Regulatory Authority) — type-approval for radio-emitting features (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth), separate from BOBS

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015); harmonic emissions fall under GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020). These are enforced under the CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA. Because GB 4343.1 and the BOS adoption both descend from CISPR 14-1, the technical base is shared, but a Chinese CCC EMC report referencing GB standards is not automatically the BOBS evidence basis.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）；谐波发射依据GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述由SAMR/CNCA在CCC制度下执行。由于GB 4343.1与BOS采用版本均源自CISPR 14-1，技术基础共通，但引用GB标准的中国CCC电磁兼容报告不自动成为BOBS的证据基础。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）；諧波發射依據GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述由SAMR/CNCA在CCC制度下執行。由於GB 4343.1與BOS採用版本均源自CISPR 14-1，技術基礎共通，但引用GB標準的中國CCC電磁相容報告不自動成為BOBS的證據基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The substantive EMC content gap is small because GB 4343.1 and the Botswana BOS/CISPR 14 adoption share the same CISPR root — for most refrigerators the test data is technically reusable. The remaining gaps are procedural and scope-based: (1) Evidence basis — a CCC report citing GB standards is not itself the BOBS basis; conformity should be supported by an IEC/CB or accredited-laboratory CISPR 14 report acceptable under the BOS import-inspection scheme; (2) Edition alignment — confirm the CISPR 14-1 edition the current BOS adopts versus the CISPR 14-1:2016 base of GB 4343.1-2018, particularly for inverter/variable-speed compressors whose switching emissions are addressed more fully in newer editions; (3) Radio features — any Wi-Fi/Bluetooth function is a separate BOCRA type-approval, not covered by the BOBS EMC route. Botswana does NOT impose an EU-style horizontal EMC Directive self-declaration; the obligation sits within the BOBS standards/import-inspection framework where applicable.
gap.zh: 电磁兼容实质内容差距较小，因为GB 4343.1与博茨瓦纳BOS/CISPR 14采用版本同源——对多数电冰箱而言检测数据技术上可复用。其余差距属程序性及范围性：（1）证据基础——引用GB标准的CCC报告本身不构成BOBS基础；符合性应由BOS进口检验制度可接受的IEC/CB或认可实验室CISPR 14报告支持；（2）版本对齐——须确认当前BOS采用的CISPR 14-1版本与GB 4343.1-2018所基于的CISPR 14-1:2016之差异，尤其针对变频/变速压缩机，其开关发射在较新版本中处理更充分；（3）无线功能——任何Wi-Fi/蓝牙功能属独立的BOCRA型号核准，不在BOBS电磁兼容途径之内。博茨瓦纳不施加欧盟式横向电磁兼容指令自我声明；该义务在适用时位于BOBS标准/进口检验框架内。
gap.zht: 電磁相容實質內容差距較小，因為GB 4343.1與波札那BOS/CISPR 14採用版本同源——對多數電冰箱而言檢測數據技術上可複用。其餘差距屬程序性及範圍性：（1）證據基礎——引用GB標準的CCC報告本身不構成BOBS基礎；符合性應由BOS進口檢驗制度可接受的IEC/CB或認可實驗室CISPR 14報告支持；（2）版本對齊——須確認當前BOS採用的CISPR 14-1版本與GB 4343.1-2018所基於的CISPR 14-1:2016之差異，尤其針對變頻/變速壓縮機，其開關發射在較新版本中處理更充分；（3）無線功能——任何Wi-Fi/藍牙功能屬獨立的BOCRA型號核准，不在BOBS電磁相容途徑之內。波札那不施加歐盟式橫向電磁相容指令自我聲明；該義務在適用時位於BOBS標準/進口檢驗框架內。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no stand-alone EU-style EMC Directive; EMC to BOS/CISPR 14 applies where the BOBS standard / import-inspection scheme covers it. Radio features require separate BOCRA type-approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) under CCC; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended; enforced by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Botswana has no separate EU-style EMC Directive; EMC is addressed via BOS/CISPR 14 within the BOBS framework where applicable, and radio features need BOCRA type-approval. The CISPR 14 base is shared with China's GB 4343.1, so Chinese EMC data is largely reusable — but should be presented as an IEC/CB or accredited-laboratory report acceptable to the BOS import-inspection scheme. Verify the current CISPR 14 edition and inverter-compressor coverage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳无独立的欧盟式电磁兼容指令；电磁兼容在适用时通过BOBS框架内的BOS/CISPR 14处理，无线功能须经BOCRA型号核准。CISPR 14基础与中国GB 4343.1共通，故中国电磁兼容数据大体可复用——但应以BOS进口检验制度可接受的IEC/CB或认可实验室报告形式提交。请核实当前CISPR 14版本及变频压缩机覆盖情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那無獨立的歐盟式電磁相容指令；電磁相容在適用時通過BOBS框架內的BOS/CISPR 14處理，無線功能須經BOCRA型號核准。CISPR 14基礎與中國GB 4343.1共通，故中國電磁相容數據大體可複用——但應以BOS進口檢驗制度可接受的IEC/CB或認可實驗室報告形式提交。請核實當前CISPR 14版本及變頻壓縮機覆蓋情況。
